transcript.text:
(The most famous food ingredient)
(that Sunchang is known for...)
(Sunchang gochujang!)
(The different tastes of dishes...) How can they be so different
(with the same Sunchang gochujang?!) although they're made with the same paste?
(Four different charms of gochujang bulgogi!)
(Four different charms of cheonggukjang!!)
(Four variations of gochujang!)
How can you be so slim with all that eating?
(It's 0 kcal when it's delicious) It's so good
(When you combine these delicious things...)
(This delicious guy appears)
(Gotta try it) The fried rice is the highlight
Come to Sunchang!
When you come to Sunchang
Sunchang-gun!

When you come to Sunchang...
(Come to Sunchang right now if you want to check these delicious dishes out!)
(This is "Sunchang", the home of the traditional paste industry)
Hello everyone!
Today I came to
Sunchang!
Sunchang is known for gochujang, right?
(Are these all gochujang...?!) Look around here, these are all gochujang
(So many gochujang pots) They are all gochujang, so many
The name of this place is also interesting
(It's Sunchang) It's called Gochujang Village
(The entire village is a gochujang shop and tourist destination!)
Look at the color of gochujang! It's amazing!
(Bright color...)
Hello!!
- Are these all gochujang? - Yes!

How long have they been here?
(They're fermented) Usually for 2 years!
(for 2 years..!) That's long!
(Let's give it a taste, haha) Really?
(The pot is open) Is it okay? Amazing
(Homemade by the locals)
(Exceptional taste and color!)
(Try some, haha) Thank you! Wow, gochujang! It looks so pretty!
(How will Sunchang gochujang taste...?) With my finger!
Yum...!! It's delicious!
It's already delicious itself!
(Always thinking about food) This will make a perfect gochujang-jjigae
(Gochujang master's recommendation) Gochujang bulgogi is nice with it
(Gochujang bulgogi must be amazing as the gochujang is already delicious..!)
(Let's go try it without hesitation!) Thank you so much! Here! Thank you!
Let's go!

(Heading near the terminal for today's mukbang!)
I came to eat gochujang bulgogi right now
There were no dishes that was made of only gochujang before
So the famous chef, Lee Wonil and Sunchang worked together for 6 months
and came up with delicious gochujang bulgogi
But it tastes different based on the restaurant
(Let's dig in!) so I'll try various gochujang bulgogi today
(Let's go enjoy different tastes of gochujang bulgogi!)
(Quick change) Ta-da!
Gochujang bulgogi dishes are ready here
They are from 4 different restaurants
They used the same recipe
but each restaurant added their own style to it
(4 different gochujang bulgogi...!) so I got them from 4 different restaurants
(It makes a perfect team with cheonggukjang!) It's a set with cheonggukjang
Gochujang bulgogi & Cheonggukjang

(This guy) I'm gonna start with this one first
(The first restaurant) This gochujang bulgogi is from "Sunchang Mat-ee-rae"
(It's one of the four restaurants)
(Sunchang Mat-ee-rae) (Located right here!)
("Sunchang Mat-ee-rae" located in Sunchang, Jeollabuk-do)
I'm gonna try it with cheonggukjang here!
(An extraordinary start from the first one..)
(Adding the smoky flavor to the stir-fried veggies first)
(Pre-grill the pork)
(Gochujang sauce is here!)
(The first gochujang bulgogi is ready!)
(Cheonggukjang as well!)
(Can I just eat it...?) How should I eat it? Is there a specific way to eat this?
(Wait there)
(The owner is here!) Hello
(How to eat 1. Cut the meat into smaller pieces!)

(How to eat 2. Enjoy it with the veggies!)
Thank you!!
I have to take the meat
and put them on the veggies
But I'll just...
(New way) put the veggies on the top instead
The mushrooms will be good, too!
(Various veggies!) There are chives, bell peppers,
onions and green onions as well!
Grilled green onions are delicious
I'll place them all on this...
Bon appétit!
Oh, it tastes different than what I expected..!
The sauce is amazing!
It's not the bulgogi texture that I'm to used to
It's like galbi? Sirloin? What should I call it?

What part is this, ma'am?
- It's shoulder - Oh, it's shoulder
I can eat so much rice with this!
(Automatically ordering rice) Can I have some rice...?
(It's time for cheonggukjang now!) Cheonggukjang! Let me try it!
Wow, it's so thick! Can you see that?
(I can tell it's flavorful already..!) The color is amazing!
(Impressed...!) This is what I'm talking about!
It has the taste of cheonggukjang I like...!
It doesn't smell too fermented
but I can taste the flavor very well!
Meat meat!
I'm gonna eat it with rice this time...!
(Tzu-man is here) It feels nice!
Sunchang is known for gochujang, right?
This gochujang is very special...!

I'll try with the veggies this time!
With mushrooms!
(Truly impressed)
(With grilled green onions this time!)
Gochujang bulgogi and cheonggukjang make a perfect harmony!
I love the fat part...!
Even the recipe for cheonggukjang is the same
(Various styles of cheonggukjang) but they all look different
so I wonder how different they'll be!
By the way, since I eat a lot,
I initially thought,
"Is it gonna be enough?"
(250g per serving!) It's 500g for 2 servings
so it's quite a lot!
("Sunchang Mat-ee-rae", ALL CLEAR!)
We tried so hard to make this flavor

and we finally found the flavor, "This is it!" after all the effort
Gochujang bulgogi and cheonggukjang
that we prepared with love
(Please show lots of love!) I hope you enjoyed it, thank you!
The next one is from "Hamyang Sikdang"
(It's the second one out of the four restaurants)
(Hamyang Sikdang) (It's located right next to the first one!)
("Hamyang Sikdang" located in Sunchang, Jeollabuk-do)
These are bulgogi and cheonggukjang from "Hamyang Sikdang"
It's been 44 years now
They'll call you a spy if you don't know us in Sunchang
(The second restaurant's special ingredient, "Water parsley")
(This restaurant's secret)
(There's spicy flavor!)
(Gochujang bulgogi & Cheonggukjang is ready!)
Looks delicious, there are three pieces of meat

But one is spicy
It's so soft
(The meat looks different in every restaurant) It's interesting that the meat looks different
These are round
Bon appétit
(Not a fan of water parsley) There's usually water parsley here
(Not a fan of water parsley) but they took it out because I can't eat it
Oh...
The gochujang flavor is strong
but the bulgogi flavor is strong too
(The standard of gochujang bulgogi) It tastes exactly like both gochujang and bulgogi
They say the sauce is all the same
It tastes similar
(Showing off their own characteristics!) but it has different characteristics, like the aroma?
(A bite of the cheonggukjang too!)
(It calls for rice haha) Can I get one more rice...?

Thank you!
There's a mixture of 2 textures!
It's delicious
(Oh? Wait a minute...)
(Got the spicy one) That was the spicy one! It's so spicy!
(Covering up the spiciness with cheonggukjang)
It's so flavorful
It feels like it's a mixture of crisp soft fat
and chewy lean meat
It's like mixed together like a puzzle
(Cutting the rest of the meat...)
I don't eat water parsley
but if you like it,
it'll be good to eat this together
The sauce is very unique
It doesn't taste like gochujang bulgogi or jeyuk

The sauce base is similar
("Hamyang Sikdang" ALL CLEAR!)
The thing they have in common is that
they all call for rice
(Owners are here!) Hello
Did you enjoy eating?
(It's the best...!) I enjoyed it very much
- Really? Thank you - I really enjoyed it
When customers eat this,
there are some
who want the spicy one as well
Half spicy, half mild
We made two sauces
No wonder... The spicy one was super spicy
- I still enjoyed it! - Thank you
When you come to Sunchang, I hope you enjoy our bulgogi!

(Cute K-heart haha) Thank you
It's called "Hae-ddeu-neun-jip"
(The third one that I'm about to try is)
(Hae-ddeu-neun-jip) (It's located on the right side of the map)
("Hae-ddeu-neun-jip" in located in Sunchang-gun, Jeollabuk-do)
Something's that's different here is
there is webfoot octopus!
(Distinct characteristics of the third restaurant)
(The most smoky one ever!)
(The secret ingredient of "Hae-ddeu-neun-jip" is webfoot octopus)
(After adding extra smoky flavor to it,)
(it's ready to go with cheonggukjang!)
It can't be webfoot octopus, it's as big as a small octopus!
(Huge webfoot octopus!) This is definitely a webfoot octopus
(Huge webfoot octopus!) I guarantee this
(How is the third restaurant?) Meat! It looks delicious!

Here,
(Correct) the smoky flavor is their signature
This is so flavorful...!
What's interesting is that there is webfoot octopus
and sweet potatoes too
It's like a sweet potato stick
Big webfoot octopus is delicious
The webfoot octopus and gochujang bulgogi go well together!
I gotta have the cheonggukjang too
Their cheonggukjang is light in color
How will it taste...?
It's delicious
All the cheonggukjangs are delicious
All the cheonggukjangs are delicious
All of them taste different
This is a very

savory cheonggukjang
It's delicious
The marinade is seasoned well
so even if the sauce is on the surface, it's well-seasoned
(Nod nod)
(Oh my, she eats a lot...)
She's amazing
(Successfully shocked the elders today as well...!)
Wow,
their smoky flavor is really the best
Cheonggukjang is really good too
It's so savory
(The owner suddenly appeared!)
Hello!
It's interesting that there are webfoot octopus in here
We also sell braised monkfish, braised spicy seafood

(Used the webfoot octopus from the braised seafood for the gochujang bulgogi!) That's right! This must be the webfoot octopus for the braised seafood
And sweet potatoes that you like!
(They change the vegetables according to the season)
(The owner is a real subscriber...!) I've been subscribed since you had 100k subscribers
You were like a niece but now...
you're pretty like my wife
- Thank you - I'm so honored to meet you and thank you for eating so deliciously
Thank you for making delicious food
Thank you for doing this for Sunchang!
My mother has been selling gochujang bulgogi since 15 years ago
It was a famous product in the region
(Peekaboo) She learned from a professional chef
and it's become a specialized food
I'd be grateful if you came by to try it
The webfoot octopus is tender
("Hae-ddeu-neun-jip" ALL CLEAR!)

Wow... That was delicious!
Time for the last one!
(Finally, the last restaurant)
(Miso Sikdang) (The one on the very left!)
("Miso Sikdang" located in Sunchang-gun, Jeollabuk-do)
This is the last place called, "Miso Sikdang"
They add water parsley too
but since I can't eat that, they took it out
Wow, this...
Doesn't this look like galbi?
(Last restaurant's top secret...)
(What is that...?)
(Even the way the meat is grilled is different here)
(Adding that smoky flavor as the finale)
(The last restaurant is ready!)
I thought, "Isn't this galbi" when I first saw it

(Thick meat similar to pork galbi!) It looks like grilled pork galbi
Bon appétit!
It's delicious...!
It's like galbi
The texture too
I know what this tastes like!!
What was it?
(It's just delicious) I don't know
It's delicious
(A bite of soulmate cheonggukjang!) The portion is big here
Oh this
(Cheonggukjang's unique charm) tastes the most like traditional cheonggukjang
It's a bit bland
but it's super savory...!
Actually,
there is a way to eat cheonggukjang

There's a specific way to eat it
(Many guest appearances today lol) Chef Lee Wonil
said you have to eat rice
You put the cheonggukjang
in the sauce that's down here
Add rice and boil it down like hangover soup
Since I have to make fried rice down here,
I'll move the meat over here
(Let's make it!) In this sauce
(Adding the leftover cheonggukjang...!)
(Adding a bowl of rice)
(It's here...!) This is the real deal
This would be another portion
(Amazing transformation of cheonggukjang and sauce) That's awesome... I'll boil it down and eat it like this way
Oh, I think it's ready!
It's sticking to the bottom now!

(Ta-da! It's ready to eat) Looks delicious
Wow, there's meat in here too
This is like fried rice
(There's a slight problem...)
(It's too hot)
(Time for Coke)
(Eating the rice on the ladle) I should eat this
Wow, this is the real deal!
(The best compliment of the day...!) You eat this to eat this, it's really good
(Come off)
This is the highlight! It's so delicious!
It's even better than your typical cheonggukjang fried rice
because of the gochujang sauce
(And the meat that I left earlier!)
I'll put it on top
This is crazy

Wow, this rice
and "Miso Sikdang" galbi(?) go well together...
Not galbi haha
This looks too much like galbi
(Upgraded version of gochujang bulgogi!) It tastes like it, too!
(After scraping)
(everything off,)
("Miso Sikdang" ALL CLEAR)
(Found the owner!) Hello
Did you enjoy eating?
Oh yes! It was delicious!
The sauce was so delicious, I really enjoyed it
(Heartwarming ending) Thank you
If you visit Sunchang,
three generations will be running the restaurant
I hope you come by and have a great time!

I came to Sunchang today
and ate gochujang bulgogi at 4 restaurants
All 4 places were delicious with their distinct characteristics!
I think the sauce was very special
Oh and as you may already know,
there's Gangcheonsan Mountain in Sunchang
And there are other
(Chaegyesan Mountain suspension bridge) good tourist attractions for families to enjoy
(Sunchang Research Institute of Health and Longevity) So please make a visit to Sunchang
and enjoy all the attractions and gochujang bulgogi as well!
I had a great meal today as well!
(Come to Sunchang)
(where there is delicious food and beautiful scenery)
(during the holiday season!)
